languages.text: "Приказом Вольного Торговца были казнены леди Моллес-Секандас, ее дети, оба ее мужа, а также — без какого-либо следствия — функционер Администратума. Таковой вердикт оставил семейные дела, принадлежавшие Моллесам и Секандасам, без достойных управляющих, что катастрофически понизило эффективность важных для Империума производств. Также из-за внезапной казни вышеупомнутый функционер не успел передать дела преемникам, из-за чего значительно пострадал документооборот девяти отделов Администратума".

"The Rogue Trader ordered the execution of Lady Molles-Secundas, her children, and both her husbands, as well as a functionary of the Administratum, in whose case there had been no formal investigation of any kind. The verdict left the Molles and Secundas family enterprises with no worthy managers, resulting in a catastrophic decline in the efficiency of production facilities of importance to the Imperium. Also due to the unexpected execution, the aforementioned functionary had no time to hand over his responsibilities to his successors, which did significant damage to the document workflow of nine Administratum departments."

languages.text: "{mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin} befahl die Hinrichtung von Lady Molles-Secundas, ihren Kindern und beiden Gatten sowie eines Funktionärs des Administratums, in dessen Fall es keinerlei offizielle Untersuchung gegeben hatte. Das Urteil hinterließ die Familienunternehmen Molles und Secundas ohne würdige Verwalter, was zu einem katastrophalen Einbruch der Effektivität von Produktionsstätten führte, die für das Imperium von einiger Bedeutung sind. Aufgrund der unerwarteten Hinrichtung hatte besagter Funktionär zudem keine Zeit, seine Pflichten einem Nachfolger zu übertragen, was den Dokumentenfluss in neun Abteilungen des Administratums signifikant schädigte."
languages.original_text: "The Rogue Trader ordered the execution of Lady Molles-Secundas, her children, and both her husbands, as well as a functionary of the Administratum, in whose case there had been no formal investigation of any kind. The verdict left the Molles and Secundas family enterprises with no worthy managers, resulting in a catastrophic decline in the efficiency of production facilities of importance to the Imperium. languages.text: « {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} a ordonné l'exécution de dame Molles-Secundas, ses enfants, ses deux maris et d'un fonctionnaire de l'Administratum. Aucune enquête officielle n'a été ouverte pour ce dernier. Ce verdict a privé les entreprises familiales Molles et Secundas de responsables compétents. Ceci a entraîné un déclin catastrophique de la production dans des usines d'importance capitale pour l'Imperium. En raison de son exécution inattendue, le fonctionnaire susmentionné n'a pas pu céder ses responsabilités à ses successeurs, ce qui eut un impact non négligeable sur le flux administratif de neuf départements de l'Administratum. »
languages.original_text: "The Rogue Trader ordered the execution of Lady Molles-Secundas, her children, and both her husbands, as well as a functionary of the Administratum, in whose case there had been no formal investigation of any kind. The verdict left the Molles and Secundas family enterprises with no worthy managers, resulting in a catastrophic decline in the efficiency of production facilities of importance to the Imperium. Also due to the unexpected execution, the aforementioned functionary had no time to hand over his responsibilities to his successors, which did significant damage to the document workflow of nine Administratum departments."

languages.text: “行商浪人下令处决了莫莱斯-塞孔达斯夫人、她的孩子们、她的两任丈夫，以及内政部一名职员。这位内政部职员没有经过任何官方调查，就遭到了处决。这样的判决导致莫莱斯家族与塞孔达斯家族企业失去了称职的管理者，许多对帝国至关重要的生产设施受到影响，生产效率大幅下滑。此外，由于内政部职员遭到突然处决，未能将自己的职责及时移交给继任者，内政部九个部门的工作流程也因此遭受了重大损害。”
languages.original_text: "The Rogue Trader ordered the execution of Lady Molles-Secundas, her children, and both her husbands, as well as a functionary of the Administratum, in whose case there had been no formal investigation of any kind. The verdict left the Molles and Secundas family enterprises with no worthy managers, resulting in a catastrophic decline in the efficiency of production facilities of importance to the Imperium. Also due to the unexpected execution, the aforementioned functionary had no time to hand over his responsibilities to his successors, which did significant damage to the document workflow of nine Administratum departments."

traits.locale_text: “行商浪人下令处决了莫莱斯-塞孔达斯夫人、她的孩子们、她的两任丈夫，以及内政部一名职员。这位内政部职员没有经过任何官方调查，就遭到了处决。这样的判决导致莫莱斯家族与塞孔达斯家族企业失去了称职的管理者，许多对帝国至关重要的生产设施受到影响，生产效率大幅下滑。此外，由于内政部职员遭到突然处决，未能将自己的职责及时移交给继任者，内政部九个部门的工作流程也因此遭受了重大损害。”

languages.text: «{mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente ordenó la ejecución de lady Molles-Secundas, sus hijos y sus dos maridos, así como la de un funcionario del Administratum sobre cuyo caso no se había producido ninguna investigación formal. El veredicto privó a las empresas de las familias Molles y Secundas de un liderazgo competente, lo que resultó en una caída catastrófica en la producción de instalaciones importantes para el Imperium. Además, la inoportuna ejecución impidió al funcionario mencionado con anterioridad repartir sus responsabilidades entre sus sucesores, lo que perjudicó considerablemente al flujo de trabajo documental de nueve departamentos del Administratum».
languages.original_text: "The Rogue Trader ordered the execution of Lady Molles-Secundas, her children, and both her husbands, as well as a functionary of the Administratum, in whose case there had been no formal investigation of any kind. The verdict left the Molles and Secundas family enterprises with no worthy managers, resulting in a catastrophic decline in the efficiency of production facilities of importance to the Imperium. Also due to the unexpected execution, the aforementioned functionary had no time to hand over his responsibilities to his successors, which did significant damage to the document workflow of nine Administratum departments."

Además, la inoportuna ejecución impidió al funcionario mencionado con anterioridad repartir sus responsabilidades entre sus sucesores, lo que perjudicó considerablemente al flujo de trabajo documental de nueve departamentos del Administratum».

languages.text: 「ローグトレーダーは、レディ・モレス・セクンダス、その子供たち、そして両名の夫たちに加え、正式な調査が一切行われていなかった、ある帝国行政局の役人の処刑を命じました。この判決により、モレス家とセクンダス家の事業は有能な経営者を失い、帝国にとって重要な生産施設の効率が壊滅的に低下しました。また、予期せぬ処刑のため、前述の役人は後任者に職務を引き継ぐ時間がなく、結果として帝国行政局の9つの部門の書類業務に大きな支障をきたしました」
languages.original_text: "The Rogue Trader ordered the execution of Lady Molles-Secundas, her children, and both her husbands, as well as a functionary of the Administratum, in whose case there had been no formal investigation of any kind. The verdict left the Molles and Secundas family enterprises with no worthy managers, resulting in a catastrophic decline in the efficiency of production facilities of importance to the Imperium. Also due to the unexpected execution, the aforementioned functionary had no time to hand over his responsibilities to his successors, which did significant damage to the document workflow of nine Administratum departments."

traits.locale_text: 「ローグトレーダーは、レディ・モレス・セクンダス、その子供たち、そして両名の夫たちに加え、正式な調査が一切行われていなかった、ある帝国行政局の役人の処刑を命じました。この判決により、モレス家とセクンダス家の事業は有能な経営者を失い、帝国にとって重要な生産施設の効率が壊滅的に低下しました。また、予期せぬ処刑のため、前述の役人は後任者に職務を引き継ぐ時間がなく、結果として帝国行政局の9つの部門の書類業務に大きな支障をきたしました」

languages.text: "Hür Tacir'in emriyle Leydi Molles-Secundas, çocukları, iki kocası ve herhangi bir resmi soruşturma yürütülmeden bir Administratum görevlisi infaz edildi. Bu karar, Molles ve Secundas aile işletmelerini ehil yöneticilerden yoksun bırakarak İmparatorluk için önemli üretim merkezlerinin veriminde yıkıcı düşüşe yol açtı. Ayrıca beklenmedik idamdan dolayı söz konusu işyarın haleflerine görev devri yapacak zamanı olmadığından, dokuz farklı Administratum dairesinin evrak akışı ağır hasar aldı."
languages.original_text: "The Rogue Trader ordered the execution of Lady Molles-Secundas, her children, and both her husbands, as well as a functionary of the Administratum, in whose case there had been no formal investigation of any kind. The verdict left the Molles and Secundas family enterprises with no worthy managers, resulting in a catastrophic decline in the efficiency of production facilities of importance to the Imperium. Also due to the unexpected execution, the aforementioned functionary had no time to hand over his responsibilities to his successors, which did significant damage to the document workflow of nine Administratum departments."
